title: uebelinia kiwuensis subsp. erlangeriana
intro: Uebelinia kiwuensis subsp. erlangeriana, also known as Uebelinia, is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its root and bark, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Uebelinia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction to be used for its medicinal properties.
